title: skill-set
description:
A named, versioned set of agent skills.
https://skill-set.md

$schema.description: URL of the skill-set JSON Schema version this manifest conforms to.

name.description: Identifier of the skill-set — must equal the manifest filename stem (<name>.skill-set.json).

version.description:
Version of this skill-set's contents, as a semantic version.
https://semver.org

description.description: Human-readable summary of what this skill-set is for.

author.description: Attribution for the skill-set's author or publisher.

name.description: Display name of the author or publisher.

url.description: Web page for the author (profile, homepage, or contact).

uri.description: Stable identity URI for the author (e.g. an agent or profile identity).

homepage.description: Web page for this skill-set (documentation or source).

skills.description: Member skills as opaque source-locator strings, optionally pinned with '#<tag-or-commit>'. Order carries no meaning; duplicates are invalid.

items.description: A source locator resolving to one skill (e.g. 'owner/repo@skill-name#v1.2.0').
